profile.title: Profile
profile.genderWarning: Please set your gender — it's required for tournament scoring.

report.title: Report cheating
report.subtitle: Reporting {{name}}. Describe what makes their performance look suspicious.
report.placeholder: e.g. impossible pace for segment X, finished too fast for their usual fitness...

landing.heroSubtitle: Join GPS-based running tournaments. Race against real people on real segments — your phone is your judge.
landing.heroNote: Free to start. No equipment beyond your phone needed.
landing.f1Text: Join scheduled tournaments with leaderboards. Multiple segments, gender-separated scoring, and bonus points for completing the full course.
landing.f2Text: Run along carefully picked GPS routes in your city. Each segment has a defined start and finish — beat your time, beat others.
landing.f3Text: Track your run with the app in your pocket. Keep your phone locked — we record the full route in the background.
landing.step1Text: Sign up with email in seconds. Pick your gender — it's used to keep scoring fair.
landing.step2Text: Browse active tournaments in your city. One tap to join — no entry fee.
landing.step3Text: Open the app, tap Start, and run. We match your GPS track to tournament segments automatically and update the leaderboard.
